name: orthogonalProjection_idempotent
plain_language_meaning: Applying an orthogonal projection twice is the same as applying it once.
supported_subclaim: Projection branch preserves a local idempotence invariant
unsupported_boundary: This does not prove better retrieval quality or optimizer stability.

name: normedSpace_triangle
plain_language_meaning: The norm of a sum is bounded by the sum of the norms.
supported_subclaim: Residual merge mixes score-space and state-space semantics
unsupported_boundary: Layer shape equality does not justify adding unlike entities.

side_conditions.condition: shape equality does not imply semantic compatibility

name: No direct formal support found in mathlib.
plain_language_meaning: No verified mathlib theorem was found for the concrete optimizer-side claim.
unsupported_boundary: No direct theorem covers the concrete optimizer and data pipeline.

side_conditions.condition: optimizer-side stability still depends on empirical stack behavior
